import sys, inspect
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
from tsr.system import TSR

model = TSR.from_pretrained('/models/triposr', config_name='config.yaml', weight_name='model.ckpt')
print('TSR class', type(model))
print('TSR.render source START')
print(inspect.getsource(TSR.render))
print('TSR.render source END')
print('TSR.forward source START')
print(inspect.getsource(TSR.forward))
print('TSR.forward source END')
print('model attrs')
for k, v in model.__dict__.items():
    if not k.startswith('_'):
        print(k, type(v))
print('named children')
for name, child in model.named_children():
    print(name, type(child))
print('renderer forward source START')
print(inspect.getsource(type(model.renderer).forward))
print('renderer forward source END')
